description: Parameter-centric uncertainty registry for the CLEAR-ATS v4 dashboard. Each referenced file contains one or more uncertainty parameters with their allowed levels, default level, paper-safe level, and explanatory text.

level_semantics.fixed: Parameter held at its deterministic central value; no Monte Carlo draw.
level_semantics.medium: Paper-safe baseline spread; reproduces committed Monte Carlo ensemble.
level_semantics.high: Exploratory wider spread; not paper-safe; clearly labelled in UI.

structural_shocks_note: Structural shock parameters (grid_stall, ev_slowdown, hardware_supply_shock, policy_freeze, geopolitical_disruption) are NEVER represented in this registry because they are discrete labelled scenarios, not Monte Carlo priors. They live in scenarios/shocks/*.json and are invoked from the Structural Shocks panel only.
